description: Create and register plugins to extend CSS framework with custom utilities, variants, and theme values

actors.name: Plugin Developer
actors.description: Creates custom utilities or theme extensions

actors.name: Framework Engine
actors.description: CSS framework that processes and applies plugins

actors.name: Consumer Project
actors.description: Project that installs and uses the plugin

values.description: Plugin function defined but not yet loaded
Plugin utilities and variants available in CSS generation

plugin_format: Plugin must export a function that receives plugin API utilities (addBase, addUtility, addVariant)
Plugin can optionally return a config object to extend theme
registration: Plugin must be registered in project config under plugins array
Plugins are applied in order; later plugins can override earlier ones
naming_conventions: Theme extension keys must match framework namespace format (--namespace-value)
config_merge: Plugin config extends theme; conflicting keys in user config take precedence
Theme.extend in plugin is recursively merged with user theme.extend
scope: Plugin utilities and variants are global; they apply to all compiled CSS
Plugin theme values are available via theme() function in arbitrary values

given: Plugin developer creates a utility for card layout
Utility should have responsive values (sm: small-size, md: medium-size)
create_simple_utility.result: Custom utility registered; available in compiled CSS (e.g., 'card', 'sm:card')

given: Plugin provides custom color palette (brand-primary: #FF6B35, brand-secondary: #004E89)
Plugin returns config object with colors
extend_theme_with_colors.result: Colors available in utilities (text-brand-primary, bg-brand-secondary) and theme() function

given: Plugin developer creates variant for 'even-child' pseudo-selector
Plugin created with plugin.withOptions to accept configuration
Consumer passes options when registering plugin
plugin_with_options.result: Plugin instance created with custom options; utilities and theme generated based on options

given: Plugin provides reset or base styles for typography
Plugin calls addBase({ h1: { fontSize: '2.5rem', fontWeight: 'bold' } })
plugin_adds_base_styles.result: Base styles injected at @layer base; applied to matched selectors without class needed

given: Plugin provides multiple utilities (prose-sm, prose-base, prose-lg)
multiple_utilities_single_plugin.result: All utilities registered; each available with responsive variants (md:prose-base, lg:prose-lg)

given: User config also defines brand color (brand: '#FF0000')
config_override_by_user.result: User-defined color takes precedence; utilities use user's color, not plugin's

given: Plugin module fails to load or export invalid structure
Plugin does not export a function
plugin_load_failure.result: Build fails; error message indicates which plugin caused failure

given: Plugin calls addUtility with invalid value structure
Or addVariant with invalid selector syntax
plugin_type_mismatch.result: Build fails; error indicates which API call was invalid

errors.message: Failed to load plugin module. Check that the plugin is properly exported and accessible.
Plugin API call is invalid. Verify utility/variant definition matches expected format.
Plugin theme values conflict with framework reserved keys. Use a custom namespace.

related.reason: Plugins can extend theme with custom values
Custom utilities composed with variants like built-in utilities
Plugins loaded and applied during build process
